description: One position / role in a work history — the canonical, version-independent record of a job. Resume documents (is.dame.resume) reference these by AT URI and choose which highlights to surface, so the same job can be reused and tailored across many resumes without duplicating its facts.

main.description: Record key is a human-readable slug (e.g. "ipfs-content-manager") so backlinks from resumes read clearly and re-imports are idempotent.

title.description: Role title held at this organization.

startDate.description: Partial date, "YYYY" or "YYYY-MM". Day-level precision is unnecessary for a resume.

endDate.description: Same format as startDate. Omit (and set current=true) for an ongoing role.

current.description: True when this is an ongoing role. Renders as "– Present".

summary.description: Optional one-line framing of the role, shown above its highlights.

highlights.description: Achievement bullets. Each carries a stable local id so a resume can select, reorder, and reuse a subset ("tailoring") without copying text.

skills.description: Skills exercised in this role. Aggregated across selected jobs to build a resume's skill list.

highlight.description: A single achievement / responsibility bullet, individually addressable within its job.

id.description: Stable id, unique within this job. Referenced from is.dame.resume entries[].highlightIds.

visibility.description: Display intent for the website. NOT a privacy control — every PDS record is publicly fetchable. "private" bullets are never rendered on the site; "unlisted" render only when a resume explicitly selects them.

featured.description: Emphasis flag — surfaced first / styled as a lead achievement.

metric.description: Marks a quantified, outcome-bearing bullet (useful for impact-first resumes).

tags.description: Free-form labels (e.g. "growth", "leadership", "writing") used to filter/tailor which bullets a given resume pulls in.
